title: KaleidoscopeChineseFood
description: Adds more Chinese dishes to Kaleidoscope Cookery.
body: Exclusive Expansion for Kaleidoscope Cookery Mod Adds a variety of authentic Chinese featured dishes, covering Cantonese flavors, Northwest specialties and Sichuan-style hearty dishes, including: Rice Noodle Rolls, Wonton Noodles, Lamb Soup with Steamed Bun, Maocai, Dry Pot Potato Slices, Boiled Fish, Scrambled Egg with Beef, Dry Pot Spare Ribs, Dry Pot Chicken, Lamb Pilaf, etc. Enriches the cooking experience and ingredient matching dimensions in the game.
